section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports hypertension and depression.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Hypertension and depression are documented elsewhere as established diagnoses rather than new, patient-reported symptoms; they function more as part of the problem list/assessment than subjective symptom reporting.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has hepatitis C, hypertension, depression, and reports fatigue.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This sentence mixes established diagnoses (appropriate for A) with a patient-reported symptom ('reports fatigue'), which belongs in the subjective section.
